title: xeraea macrorhiza
intro: Xeraea macrorhiza, also known as the greater desert marigold or desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Xeraea macrorhiza has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's flowers and leaves can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
